title: Section 2
content: 1*** In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires,-- (a) "article" means an article of the Constitution; (b) "Assembly constituency" means a constituency provided 2[by law] for the purpose of elections to the Legislative Assembly of a State; (c) "Council constituency" means a constituency provided 3[by law] for the purpose of elections to the Legislative Council of a State; 4* * * * (d) "Election Commission" means the Election Commission appointed by the President under article 324; (e) "order" means an order published in the Official Gazette; (f) "Parliamentary constituency" means a constituency provided 5[by law for the purpose of elections to the House of the People; 6* * * * (g) "person" does not include a body of persons; (h) "prescribed" means prescribed by rules made under this Act; 7[(i) "State" includes a Union territory;] (j) "State Government", in relation to a Union territory, means the administrator thereof. 8* * * * *
footnote: 1. The brackets and figure "(1)" omitted by Act 103 of 1956, s. 65 (w.e.f. 1-1-1957). 2. Subs. by Act 2 of 1956, s. 2, for "by order made under section 9" (w.e.f. 1-3-1956). 3. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956, for "by order made under section 11" (w.e.f.1-11-1956). 4. Omitted by Act 103 of 1956, s. 65 (1-1-1957). 5. Subs. by Act 2 of 1956, s. 2, for "by section 6 or by order made thereunder" (1-3-1956). 6. Omitted by the North-Eastern Areas (Reorganisation) (Adaptation of Laws on Union Subjects) Order, 1974, s. 3 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 21-1-1972). 7. Subs. by s. 3 and the Schedule, ibid., for clause (i) (w.e.f. 21-1-1972). 8. Omitted by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956 (w.e.f. 1-11-1956).
